items.special_treatment: All activity measurements (oxidation and reduction assays) were performed in semi-micro cuvettes (total volume 1 mL) for 1 min. No explicit mention of mixing or shaking is given for the cuvette-based spectrophotometric assays. For temperature-dependent stability studies, enzyme incubation was performed in a Thermomixer comfort (Eppendorf), which implies controlled mixing, but the speed or type is not specified.
